data.title: CLP Holdings Reports Strong 2024 Results and Advances in Non-Carbon Initiatives
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

CLP Holdings ( (HK:0002) ) has issued an announcement.

CLP Holdings announced strong annual results for 2024, highlighting an 8.1% increase in operating earnings before fair value movements to HK$10,949 million and a significant rise in total earnings to HK$11,742 million. The company has made substantial progress in its non-carbon business, including the commissioning of a new gas-fired generation unit and the retirement of coal units in Hong Kong. CLP’s efforts align with Hong Kong’s decarbonization goals and support China’s renewable energy expansion. In Australia, EnergyAustralia’s improved operational performance has bolstered financial results. CLP remains committed to sustainable growth and contributing to regional decarbonization initiatives.

More about CLP Holdings

CLP Holdings Limited is a prominent company in the electricity industry, primarily focusing on providing world-class electricity services and sustainable energy solutions. The company is committed to advancing low-carbon energy development and operates in various markets, including Hong Kong, Mainland China, and Australia.

YTD Price Performance: 6.66%

Average Trading Volume: 3,200

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $20.96B

For a thorough assessment of 0002 stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Chorus Limited Reports Mixed Financial Results Amid Transition
data.description:
Chorus Limited ( (CHRUF) ) has released its Q2 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Chorus Limited presented to its investors.

Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Chorus Limited is New Zealand’s largest fixed-line communications infrastructure company, primarily operating in the telecommunications sector and known for its extensive network of fibre and copper cables. In its latest half-year earnings report for the period ending December 31, 2024, Chorus Limited reported a stable EBITDA of $346 million, despite facing challenges from an ongoing economic recession in New Zealand. However, the company recorded a net loss of $5 million, attributed mainly to accelerated depreciation of its copper assets as it transitions to an all-fibre network. Key financial highlights included a slight decrease in revenue to $500 million, driven by a decline in copper service revenues, while fibre broadband revenues increased by $20 million. The company’s dividend per share rose significantly to 23 cents, reflecting a positive financial strategy despite reduced capital expenditure. Looking forward, Chorus Limited remains focused on managing costs and optimizing its fibre network, while navigating the impacts of economic conditions and regulatory factors.

data.title: Paragon REIT Moves Towards Privatization with Trust Scheme
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Paragon REIT ( (SG:SK6U) ) has issued an update.

Paragon REIT is undergoing a proposed privatization through a trust scheme of arrangement, as announced by its manager and Times Properties Private Limited, a subsidiary of Cuscaden Peak Pte. Ltd. Morgan Stanley Asia (Singapore) Pte. is serving as the financial adviser for this scheme, which is structured in accordance with the Singapore Code on Take-overs and Mergers. The dealings by associates of Morgan Stanley in Paragon REIT securities are disclosed as required, and they are conducted independently of the scheme, ensuring no impact on the scheme consideration.

More about Paragon REIT

data.title: Tribeca Global Natural Resources Releases Estimated NTA Per Share
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

The latest update is out from Tribeca Global Natural Resources Ltd. ( (AU:TGF) ).

Tribeca Global Natural Resources Limited has released its estimated net tangible assets (NTA) per ordinary share as of February 21, 2025, with a pre-tax estimate of $1.95 and a post-tax estimate of $2.05. Although these estimates are indicative and based on previous data, they do not fully account for the performance of private credit and other unlisted assets, which are not valued weekly. This announcement provides insight into the company’s financial status but cautions stakeholders that these figures are unaudited and part of a broader monthly financial performance review.

More about Tribeca Global Natural Resources Ltd.

Tribeca Global Natural Resources Limited operates in the natural resources industry, focusing on investments in various sectors including equities and private credit. The company is involved in managing a portfolio of securities with a focus on maximizing net tangible assets for its shareholders.

data.title: HomeCo Daily Needs REIT Announces Quarterly Fund Payment
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

HomeCo Daily Needs REIT ( (AU:HDN) ) has provided an update.

HomeCo Daily Needs REIT has announced a fund payment notice for the quarter ended 31 December 2024, with a total cash distribution rate of 2.125 cents per unit. This announcement reflects HDN’s ongoing strategy to deliver consistent returns to its investors, emphasizing its role as a key player in the Australian real estate market. The distribution includes a fund payment component of 2.491303 cents per unit, and the trust intends to operate as an attribution managed investment trust for the year ending June 2025. This financial update signifies HDN’s healthy standing in the real estate sector, aiming to maintain investor confidence and strategic growth.

More about HomeCo Daily Needs REIT

HomeCo Daily Needs REIT (HDN) is an Australian Real Estate Investment Trust listed on the ASX, focusing on investments in convenience-based assets across Neighbourhood Retail, Large Format Retail, and Health & Services. The trust aims to provide unitholders with consistent and growing distributions, holding approximately $4.9 billion in assets across key metropolitan areas in Australia. Additionally, HDN is a strategic investor in the Last Mile Logistics fund, targeting core plus transition assets for essential last mile real estate infrastructure.

Standard Chartered ( (GB:STAN) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Standard Chartered PLC has announced a change in its major holdings with an acquisition or disposal of voting rights by The Capital Group Companies, Inc., based in Los Angeles, USA. As of February 19, 2025, The Capital Group Companies holds a 5.042206% voting rights stake in Standard Chartered, indicating a strategic position in the company’s governance and potential influence on its decision-making processes.

An update from Radiopharm Theranostics Limited ( (AU:RAD) ) is now available.

Radiopharm Theranostics Limited announced its participation in the TD Cowen Annual Healthcare Conference in Boston, where CEO Riccardo Canevari will present the company’s investment proposition. This presentation is a strategic move to attract investor interest, showcasing Radiopharm’s world-class pipeline and potential market leadership in radiopharmaceuticals, particularly in areas with high unmet medical needs.

More about Radiopharm Theranostics Limited

Radiopharm Theranostics Limited is a clinical-stage radiotherapeutics company focused on developing innovative radiopharmaceutical products for both diagnostic and therapeutic applications. It has a deep pipeline of differentiated molecules including peptides, small molecules, and monoclonal antibodies, targeting cancers such as brain, lung, breast, and pancreas, and is listed on the ASX since November 2021.
